title: No #[cfg(feature)] in backend crates — correct isolation architecture
description: Feature flags live only in secretx/src/lib.rs (15-line dispatch), not in any backend crate. A future contributor adding a new backend may be tempted to add #[cfg(feature = "..")] guards inside an existing crate to reduce code size. Do not do this. The architecture guarantees that each backend crate compiles in isolation, that cargo hack --feature-powerset works cleanly, and that no backend has any compile-time dependency on other backends. Each backend is a standalone crate.
